evals.prompt:
帮我熔炼这些素材，提炼关键内容：

1. https://arxiv.org/html/2604.13016v2 — Rethinking On-Policy Distillation of Large Language Models
2. https://thinkingmachines.ai/blog/on-policy-distillation/ — On-Policy Distillation (Thinking Machines Lab)

主题是 On-Policy Distillation 的机制、效果和边界条件。输出 forge-output.md。
evals.expected_output: A forge-output.md file with: Sources section listing both URLs with metadata, Key Excerpts from both papers, Data Points table with quantitative claims, Figure Inventory (even if empty/flagged), Cross-References between the two sources, and Gaps & Questions section.
expectations: Output file is named forge-output.md
Sources section lists both input URLs with title, author, and type
Key Excerpts section has at least 3 [KEY] marked quotes
Every excerpt has a source attribution tag
Data Points table has at least 2 rows with numeric claims
Figure Inventory section exists (even if all entries are flagged for recreation)
Cross-References section identifies at least 1 overlapping claim between the two sources
Gaps & Questions section lists at least 1 open question
No hallucinated content — all claims trace to the input sources
Output follows FORGE-STYLE.md template structure (Sources → Excerpts → Data Points → Figures → Gaps)

evals.prompt:
熔炼这些资料，关于 DeepSeek V4 的 MoE 架构和推理优化：

本地文件：skills/synapse-forge/evals/files/local-notes.md

URL：https://zhuanlan.zhihu.com/p/2031622077107659474 — 从 DeepSeek V4 的多专家on-policy Distillation 反观人类学习模式

把两个来源交叉对比，提取关键数据和矛盾点。输出 forge-output.md。
evals.expected_output: A forge-output.md combining local file data and URL content. Should show cross-references between the local notes' performance numbers and the URL article's claims. Any contradictions between sources should be flagged with [CONFLICT].
expectations: Sources section includes both the local file path and the URL with metadata
Key Excerpts from local-notes.md include the performance numbers (14.2k tokens/sec, <2ms P99, ~30% memory reduction)
Key Excerpts from the URL source include OPD-related content
Data Points table includes quantitative claims from both sources
Cross-References section connects overlapping themes (MoE architecture, expert routing, distillation)
Any contradictions between local notes and URL article are flagged with [CONFLICT]
Figure Inventory identifies images from the URL source
Output structure follows FORGE-STYLE.md template
Local file content is accurately quoted (not paraphrased beyond recognition)

evals.prompt:
提炼这些来源的关键内容，主题是 OPD 的效率优势和失败模式：

本地文件：skills/synapse-forge/evals/files/opd-local-notes.md

URLs:
1. https://arxiv.org/html/2604.13016v2
2. https://thinkingmachines.ai/blog/on-policy-distillation/
3. https://arxiv.org/pdf/2602.12125v1 — Entropy-Aware OPD

三个 URL 加一个本地文件，要求重点摘抄效率数据（GPU hours、benchmark 分数）和失败模式（强老师悖论、entropy collapse）。输出 forge-output.md。
evals.expected_output: A forge-output.md synthesizing 4 sources (1 local + 3 URLs). Heavy focus on efficiency data extraction and failure mode analysis. Should have rich Data Points table, Cross-References linking the efficiency claims across sources, and Gaps identifying what's still unclear about OPD failure modes.
expectations: Sources section lists all 4 inputs (1 local + 3 URLs) with complete metadata
Key Excerpts include efficiency data: 1,800 GPU hours (OPD), 17,920 GPU hours (RL), 74.4% AIME score
Key Excerpts include failure mode analysis: strong teacher paradox, entropy collapse, thinking pattern misalignment
Data Points table has at least 5 rows covering both efficiency and failure mode claims
Cross-References link the same efficiency claims across multiple sources (e.g., GPU hours appearing in both local notes and URL papers)
Local file's specific numbers (92% teacher performance, 35% drop, 5 iterations) appear in Data Points or Key Excerpts
Gaps & Questions addresses what's still unknown about OPD failure modes
No content fabricated — every claim traces to a specific source
Entropy-Aware OPD (G-OPD) concepts from the third URL appear in the output
Figure Inventory exists and flags key diagrams for recreation or download
